fieldValues.value:
`FieldGroup.compositeRenderer` dispatch; `groupFieldRowTemplates`; `compositeRendererConfig` on `ElementTemplates`.

<!-- srs-integration:v1
ext:field-groups
ext:themes-l1
schema:type.json
schema:theme.json
-->

Adds a composite-renderer dispatch (`FieldGroup.compositeRenderer`, first value `table`) so structured groups render as composed output rather than raw rows, retroactively specifies `groupFieldRowTemplates`, and adds a generalised `compositeRendererConfig` surface on `ElementTemplates`. Full text: rfcs/rfc-007-composite-group-rendering.md.
